steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage defines land art, then highlights its wildly diverse methods of creation, then gives two concrete examples of that diversity. The question asks what structural role the passage plays.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — artist biographies: the passage contains no biographical information about individual artists. ✗
  • Choice B — criticism of the genre: the passage does not criticize land art. ✗
  • Choice C — correcting a misconception: the passage does not identify or address any misconception. ✗
  • Choice D — a genre's definition followed by examples of a defining trait: the passage defines land art, identifies diversity as its defining trait, and supplies two examples — a direct match. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
